title: Watch Out for the Automobile
actors: Innokentiy Smoktunovskiy, Oleg Efremov, Lyubov Dobrzhanskaya
plot: A very good cop tries to catch a very bad and extremely clever car thief. The irony's that the thief isn't very clever, nor is he a bad person. In fact, he's not just a virtuous person he's also the 'cop's best friend.
